ddls:
CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or UT where the arrests occurred */,
  "total_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of persons arrested, including those from the previous year */,
  "released_before_trial" INTEGER /* Number of persons released before trial */,
  "charges_filed" INTEGER /* Number of persons charged in court */,
  "under_investigation" INTEGER /* Number of persons under investigation at the end of the year */,
  "pendency_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of cases pending at the end of the year */,
  "all_india_pendency_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of pendency in comparison to the All-India total */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of the arrest */,
  "arrest_location" TEXT /* Location where the arrest was made */,
  "arresting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who made the arrest */,
  "arrest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the arrest */,
  "arrest_status" TEXT /* Current status of the arrest (e.g., in custody, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_arresting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("arresting_officer_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or UT */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or UT */,
  "is_union_territory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the entry is a union territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or UT */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state or UT */,
  "head_of_state" TEXT /* Name of the head of the state or UT */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or UT */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or agency the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offenses" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of offense */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the offense */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the offense (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the offense (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties associated with the offense */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal reference for the offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest record associated with the charge */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of offense charged */,
  "charge_date" TEXT /* Date when the charge was filed */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the charge */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court where the charge was filed */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge presiding over the case */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the next hearing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding arrest record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the investigation (e.g., ongoing, closed) */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator assigned to the case */,
  "investigation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation started */,
  "investigation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation ended */,
  "investigation_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes or findings of the investigation */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* List of evidence collected during the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or agency the investigator belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the investigator (e.g., detective, inspector) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., cybercrime, forensics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, monthly) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report (e.g., 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the access occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
